body.title: Fix AR-002: primary-classes-must-inherit-igorbase violations
body.result: AR-002 already clean: audit_check_igorbase.py exits 0 — ToolRegistry exempted in c0b49afa, all other primary classes already inherit IgorBase
body.description:
audit_runner.py --drain reports AR-002 failures: classes in devices/igor/cognition,memory,tools,network,brainstem that don't inherit IgorBase and aren't exempt. Run `python3 lab/claudecode/audit_check_igorbase.py` to get the full list.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/ (specific files from audit output)
**Design rules:** D125 — primary component classes must inherit IgorBase
**Scope boundary:** IN — add IgorBase to the violating classes or add them to EXEMPT_CLASS_NAMES with justification; OUT — don't change IgorBase itself
**Completion criteria:** `python3 lab/claudecode/audit_check_igorbase.py` exits 0 with no output
